overview.description: Open-source cloud sandbox infrastructure for AI agents
overview.description_long: E2B (FoundryLabs, Inc.) provides secure, isolated cloud sandboxes that give AI agents real-world compute environments to safely execute code, process data, and run tools. Used by 88% of Fortune 100 companies. Their open-source platform powers agentic workflows at scale — from code interpretation to full computer-use agents.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2023 by Czech childhood friends Tomáš Valenta and Václav Mlejnský, who studied at the Faculty of Mathematics and Physics. They started with iPhone game development, then pivoted through computer vision to building cloud infrastructure for AI agents.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Czech Republic; GitHub org created March 2023
Raised $11.5M seed round led by Decibel Partners
Raised $21M Series A led by Insight Partners; total funding $32M
88% of Fortune 100 companies signed up on platform
Hundreds of millions of sandboxes launched across Fortune 500

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: E2B is infrastructure — they provide secure, isolated compute environments (VMs/sandboxes) that AI agents inherently need to run code safely. The more capable AGI becomes, the more it needs controlled execution environments like E2B's sandboxes. This is a 'picks and shovels' infrastructure play that AGI commoditization would accelerate rather than replace.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI agent infrastructure is one of the fastest-growing segments in enterprise software. E2B has proven PMF with 88% of Fortune 100 already on platform and hundreds of millions of sandboxes launched. They are becoming the open-source standard for AI agent compute, backed by Insight Partners.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded with $32.5M total ($21M Series A in July 2025 led by Insight Partners). Strong investor syndicate including Decibel, Sunflower Capital, and Kaya VC. Enterprise customer base across Fortune 100 provides solid revenue foundation.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: E2B occupies a defensible infrastructure layer in the AI agent ecosystem. Their open-source community lock-in, Fortune 100 customer base, and infrastructure moat (secure sandboxed VMs) make them well-positioned. As AI agents proliferate, demand for their product increases rather than decreases.

metadata.notes: Legal entity is FoundryLabs, Inc. (US-incorporated). GitHub org location shows 'United States of America' but founders are Czech and company is listed in Prague AI ecosystem. Series A blog mentions expanding teams in San Francisco. Employees range estimated from GitHub public members (8) and company growth stage.
